"'''Luke Skywalker: Detective'''" was a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] appearing in [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]].

==Plot summary==
Sometime during his teenage years, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was challenged to a speeder race by a local braggart, [[Gorm Maldorf]], in [[The Cage]]. On the morning of the race, Gorm's decapitated body was found in The Cage. Skywalker began his own investigation of the [[Death/Legends|death]], and with the help of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], he deduced that Gorm had been accidentally killed by his companion [[Chester]] the night before, while attempting to rig The Cage for the race.
